rulings.Rulings: DEFENDANT METROPOLITAN LIFE INSURANCE COMPANY Motion To Strike 3rd Amended Complaint In Whole & In Part OVERRULE-DEMURRER. DEFENDANT TO ANSWER 20 DAYS.(302/REQ/PB) GRANT-MOTION TO STRIKE WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS FOLLOWS; 1.) AS TO DAMAGES ALLEGATIONS IN PARAGRAPH 71, 72, 104 AND PARAGRAPH 7 OF THE PRAYER RELATES TO UCL CAUSES OF ACTION. 2.) PORTION OF PARAGRAPH 120 WHICH REFERENCES WELFARE & INSTITUTION CODE 15657 3.) PARAGRAPH 9 OF THE PRAYER 4.) REFERENCES TO CC 1923.5 IN PARAGRAPH 48 5.) PARAGRAPH 68, 100 RE DISGOREMENT AND PARAGRAPH 6 OF THE PRAYER DENY MOTION STRIKE AS TO REMAINDER.(302/REQ/PB)
